name: ss14-art
description: Repo-local Codex plugin that routes agents to the canonical SS14 Art plugin rules and skills.

interface.shortDescription: SS14 fork rules, skills, and review guardrails
interface.longDescription: Routes Codex and compatible agents to the repository canonical SS14-Art Project instruction layer under .agents/rules and .agents/skills. It focuses on SS14 fork isolation, prediction, localization, modular ECS code, .NET 10 freshness checks, and narrow upstream diffs.
defaultPrompt: Use SS14-Art rules before changing SS14 code.
Review this PR for SS14-Art fork guardrails.
Find the right SS14 skill for this change.
